title: Continental: Very Localized In The US
article_text: Continental has improved profitability through cost savings, despite revenue pressure from OEM slowdown and macroeconomic concerns, particularly in Europe and North America. The automotive segment saw significant cost reductions and some pricing measures, though platform launch delays and OEM volume declines remain challenges. The tire segment is performing well, with stabilized truck volumes and a shift towards higher-margin replacement business and high-performance tires, offsetting OEM slowdown.

title: Continental AG says it will separate rubber unit, likely put it up for sale
article_text: Germany's Continental AG on Tuesday said it would turn its ContiTech rubber and plastics division into an independent entity that would likely be put up for sale.

title: Continental: Still A Potential Entry At Current Levels
article_text: Continental AG is undergoing a significant portfolio transformation, including spinning off its auto segment, making it an attractive investment opportunity. The company's tire business is a cash cow with solid margins, focusing on ultra-performance tires to counter Chinese import competition. Continental's valuation remains supportive of excellent returns, with a potential 41.2% annualized RoR by 2027, making it a strong "Buy" at current prices.

title: Continental AG's supervisory board approves spin-off for automotive business
article_text: Continental AG's supervisory board on Wednesday formally approved plans for spinning-off the group's automotive business, which will have cash funds of 1.5 billion euros ($1.64 billion) before the process is completed.

title: German prosecutors seize documents at Continental AG in diesel probe
article_text: German prosecutors seized documents at automotive supplier Continental on Wednesday in connection with an investigation into the illegal use of defeat devices in diesel engines, the Hanover prosecutor's office said on Thursday.

title: Continental cuts 2021 vehicle production outlook on chips crunch
article_text: German automotive supplier Continental AG cut its growth forecast for the production of passenger and light commercial vehicles in 2021 on Thursday due to a chip supply crunch it sees persisting throughout the year.

title: Lidar supplier AEye inks deals with Continental, TuSimple
article_text: Self-driving sensor maker AEye Inc on Wednesday said it had struck deals with German automotive supplier Continental AG and autonomous trucking firm TuSimple related to its technology.

title: Continental AG's net loss contracts to £825 million in 2020
article_text: Continental AG (ETR: CON) said on Tuesday that its net loss contracted in 2020 despite a decline in sales due to the ongoing Coronavirus pandemic. The company, however, expressed confidence that its financial performance will recover sharply in the upcoming months.

title: Continental forecasts lower full-year sales as COVID-19 weighs on demand
article_text: Continental AG (ETR: CON) revised its guidance for 2020 on Wednesday and said that it now expects a smaller adjusted earnings margin and lower sales for the full year. In the prior year (fiscal 2019), Continental AG had seen a net loss of £1.09 billion, as per the report published in March.

title: Continental AG Takes Stake In AEye To Enhance Its Autonomous Vehicle Technology
